subtitle: Week starts with Marie on leave, James returning mid-week
context: You're managing HR Systems at Oxford with multiple active projects: IM Principles URL migration (go-live 23/24 June), College Staff in PeopleXD proposal (awaiting decisions), and several technical systems issues (GitHub dashboard failures, Access cases). James Salas Guillen is on leave until 18 June.
